concerns: Test helpers (makeSnapshot, makeEntropy, etc.) in tests/us-027/threat-rules.test.ts are local functions, not exported. Plan says 'reuse' but they will need to be duplicated into the US-029 test file or extracted to a shared utility.

Rule 6 ('Clear persistent storage') triggers when 'all storage types supported', which is true for virtually every modern browser. This would generate a low-value recommendation for nearly every user. Consider restricting the trigger to only 'persistent-storage: granted' to avoid noise.
